name: roku-graphify
description: BrightScript code graph analysis tool powered by tree-sitter

scripts.build-grammar: cd tree-sitter-brightscript && npx tree-sitter generate && npx node-gyp configure && npx node-gyp build
scripts.test: node src/cli.js examples/demo.brs --format json && node -e "require('./src/graphify-integration')" && echo 'All checks passed'
